name: Field of 68 After Dark
tagline: Where college basketball happens. Every single night.
description: The flagship show of The Field of 68 network. Rob Dauster, Jeff Goodman, John Fanta, Terrence Oglesby, Randolph Childress, Tyler Hansbrough, and more break down the college basketball season every single night — live on YouTube with over 1,400 episodes and counting.

latestEpisode.title: Offseason Update: Latest Transfer Portal Moves & Reactions

name: The GHM Podcast
tagline: Jeff Goodman, Robbie Hummel & Brian McCall go deep on college hoops.
description: Jeff Goodman, former Purdue All-American Robbie Hummel, and Brian McCall break down the biggest stories in college basketball every week with the access and insider knowledge only three of the sport's most respected voices can provide.

latestEpisode.title: NIL Market Explosion, Portal Prizes & What's Next for College Hoops

name: Shooters Shoot!
description: The show where no take is too hot and no opinion is off limits. Shooters Shoot! is the Field of 68 at its most unfiltered — bold predictions, strong opinions, and the college basketball debates you can't get anywhere else.

latestEpisode.title: Shooters Shoot: Our Boldest Offseason Takes

name: A-10 Insider
tagline: An official Field of 68 partnership with the Atlantic 10.
description: An exclusive partnership with the Atlantic 10 Conference. The most complete A-10 coverage anywhere — coaches, players, administrators, and every storyline that matters in one of college basketball's best mid-major conferences.

latestEpisode.title: A-10 Portal Roundup: Who's In, Who's Out & What It Means

name: Mountain West Insider
tagline: An official Field of 68 partnership with the Mountain West.
description: An exclusive partnership with the Mountain West Conference. Rob Dauster and Jeff Goodman cover all 11 teams in one of college basketball's most underrated leagues — from coaches and players to administrators and the storylines that define the conference.

latestEpisode.title: Mountain West Offseason: Portal, Recruiting & 2026-27 Preview

name: WCC Insider
tagline: West Coast Conference — covered like no one else.
description: All things West Coast Conference basketball. From Gonzaga's national title ceiling to the programs hungry to knock them off — WCC Insider has the reporting, analysis, and storylines that matter most on the West Coast.

latestEpisode.title: WCC Offseason: Gonzaga's Roster, Portal Moves & Conference Outlook

name: ACC Insider
tagline: Your deepest dive into the Atlantic Coast Conference.
description: Full coverage of the Atlantic Coast Conference — one of college basketball's most storied leagues. Coaches, players, recruiting, portal moves, and the storylines defining the ACC every season.

latestEpisode.title: ACC Portal Chaos, Coaching Changes & Early Season Preview

name: The Ground Floor
tagline: An NBA Draft Podcast with No Ceilings.
description: The Field of 68's dedicated NBA Draft show. Freshman breakouts, sleeper prospects, mock drafts, and the players who will define the sport for the next decade — with no ceiling on the analysis.

latestEpisode.title: 2026 NBA Draft Deep Dive: Top Prospects, Risers & Fallers

name: Next Gen Hoops
tagline: A Field of 68 and Rivals Podcast.
description: A collaboration between The Field of 68 and Rivals. Next Gen Hoops covers the future of college basketball — recruiting, the transfer portal, the rising stars and the programs building for tomorrow.

latestEpisode.title: Next Gen: Top 2027 Recruits & The Programs Winning the Future

name: The Mid Major Show
tagline: The best mid-major basketball coverage anywhere.
description: The show dedicated to mid-major college basketball — the programs, coaches, and players flying under the radar who make March Madness what it is. Nobody covers mid-majors like The Field of 68.

latestEpisode.title: Mid-Major Summer: Best Portal Additions & Programs on the Rise

name: Fielding the 68
description: The community show. Every week the Field of 68 team answers your questions, debates your takes, and gives fans direct access to the conversation. Your voice. Our platform.

latestEpisode.title: You Asked, We Answered: Transfer Portal, Coaching Carousel & Hot Takes
